headline: BASFY Closes Expandable Polystyrene Assets in South Korea's Ulsan
summary: BASF will end EPS production at South Korea's Ulsan Plastics site by mid-June 2026 as it reviews its styrenics network and competitiveness.

raw.headline: BASFY Closes Expandable Polystyrene Assets in South Korea's Ulsan
raw.summary: BASF will end EPS production at South Korea's Ulsan Plastics site by mid-June 2026 as it reviews its styrenics network and competitiveness.

headline: JP Morgan Maintains Overweight on Nucor, Raises Price Target to $282
summary: JP Morgan  analyst Bill Peterson   maintains Nucor (NYSE:NUE) with a Overweight and raises the price target from $240 to $282.

raw.headline: JP Morgan Maintains Overweight on Nucor, Raises Price Target to $282
